The '''Rhen Var Harbor''' was an ancient location on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhen Var/Legends|Rhen Var]] in use before the planet was plunged into an ice-age.<ref name="BFI guide">[[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Battlefront'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref> The harbor served one of many sites where the [[Battle of Rhen Var (Clone Wars)|Battle of Rhen Var]] took place during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="BFI" />

The goal of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was to take over the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] sensor station that was located in the harbor. The Republic was able to infiltrate the harbor through a series of ice tunnels, as well as the use of [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TEs]].<ref name="BFI" />

The Rhen Var Harbor was a massive [[Fortress/Legends|fortress]] that also included an old lighthouse and a small citadel. The [[Rhen Var Citadel]] ruins were to the west of the fortress.<ref name="BFI guide" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Rhen Var Harbor appears in a map in the [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]''. During the Historical Campaign, the battle on the map appears as a Galactic Republic mission, although the game's story is [[Canon|secondary continuity]], according to [[Leland Chee]], the keeper of [[Lucasfilm]]'s [[Holocron continuity database]].<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|holocron|56|starwars.com forum HolocronKeeper comments archive}}</ref> The map is also available in the game's [[Star Wars: Battlefront II|sequel]] via an [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] Live patch.
